display.title: USD1 Trading Competition
display.summary: Volume-ranked Byreal trading competition restricted by this skill to three core pools: USD1/USDC, SOL/USD1, and WLFI/USDC. Ranking is based on eligible USD volume.
display.reward_pool_text: Rewards are paid in WLFI within 21 days after the event ends. Minimum eligible volume: $20,000 for Top 10, $5,000 for ranks #11-#300.

rules.source: Byreal official USD1 Trading Competition docs

eligibility.description: This skill only executes the three configured core pools for this campaign: USD1/USDC, SOL/USD1, and WLFI/USDC.

scoring.notes: Every 1 USD of eligible volume counts equally; the RealClaw 1.1x boost is the only documented exception.

fees.notes: Official docs state the total fee is 0.60% (Pool Fee + Router Fee) for most pools during the competition; a two-leg round trip may therefore exceed a strict total-cost gate before price impact.

rewards.distribution: paid to the participating wallet within 21 days after the event ends

terms: Byreal reserves final interpretation and reward distribution remains subject to Byreal's final review.
Terms may change without prior notice. The English version prevails.

notes: Official docs list the eligible core pairs and rules for the USD1 Trading Competition. Keep this season immutable after deployment; for a new season, add a new campaign config instead of editing this file in place.
